ops.text: jj-based ccx vcs ship bypasses prek (git pre-commit hooks don't run on jj commits), and the go capt-hook pack blocks running gofumpt/golangci-lint by hand — so lint violations keep reaching CI as red runs (twice today: de-vendor commit, read/overview flip). The loop is: ship → CI lint red → fix commit → re-ship, costing a full CI cycle each time. ship (or the jj lane) needs a pre-push lint stage, or the guard pack needs a ship-time carve-out.
